findings.problem: The intake's middle third keeps returning to the same dramatic point, that Research Integrity's vocabulary cannot hold advisor coercion, without enough intervening state change. Because the scene re-argues that limitation in several adjacent passes, the meeting briefly plateaus instead of tightening all the way to the suspension notice.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or differentiate the exchanges anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:269, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:337, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:377. Keep one early beat that makes the institutional-vocabulary failure explicit, then make each later beat do a distinct job on the page: force Leela into the documentary-evidence lie, formalize the access restriction, and expose the copied-to-Mohit dependency consequence.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a read of the revised intake around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:269, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:337, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:377 shows that each retained exchange changes the situation in a different way visible on the page. Fail if two adjacent exchange blocks still only restate that the office's language is too small for Mohit's coercion without changing what Leela admits, what the office records, or what consequence is imposed.

findings.problem: The chapter leans too often on the same explanatory comparison scaffolds, especially `as if ...` and `the kind that ...`. Repeating that architecture across opening, lobby, administrator description, walk-back, and lockout beats makes the voice feel mannered in a way the constitution explicitly warns against: by the later uses, the sentence shape is more noticeable than the image.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the sentences anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:105, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:145, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:431, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:477 so those beats land through direct material detail or a different sentence architecture instead of the same comparison frame. Preserve only the instances whose comparison does irreplaceable interpretive work.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, on a read of the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:105, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:145, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:431, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:477, at least three no longer use the `as if` or `the kind that` scaffold and the chapter contains no more than two instances of either exact scaffold. Fail if the revised chapter still repeats either comparison frame more than twice.

findings.problem: `Passwordless auth attempted.` is clipped pseudo-terminal narration rather than clearly marked system output. It violates the constitution's ban on article- and subject-stripped narration and briefly breaks the chapter's otherwise controlled register at the exact moment the lockout should land hardest.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:477, either present the machine response as explicit terminal output tied to the login attempt or rewrite the beat as full grammatical narration rooted in Leela's action and perception. Do not leave an unmarked clipped sentence in the narrative stream.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:477 reads either as clearly separated machine output or as a grammatically complete narrative sentence. Fail if the passage still contains an unmarked clipped construction on the model of `Passwordless auth attempted.`

summary: Boundary beats land: the Research Integrity meeting is banal and frightening, the office's language fails to contain the coercive advisor relationship, and the interim suspension of `hades-admin` materially changes the story state in line with the boundary pack and continuity sheet. Leela, Omar, June, Mara, and Brendan remain distinct and style-bible-consistent on register; Omar's lone uncontracted line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:131 reads as deliberate stress precision, not drift. No continuity contradiction, tense drift, sanitization drift, timidity failure, or dialogue-contraction failure surfaced. Craft/prose still fail because the intake's middle passes over the same institutional-language point too many times before the consequence lands, and because repeated comparison scaffolds plus one clipped narration sentence make the prose feel more formulaic than this chapter's material can afford.
